expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总测量，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นหลัง. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay sukat ng kabuuan, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng itaas, ibaba at gilid na board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng background board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများအားတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်သည်။ [BoardThick] သည်အထက်၊ အောက်နှင့်ခွဲစိတ်ထားသောဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអាគារប្លាកសម្រាប់ទូ។[Width], [Height],[Depth]គឺជាលទ្ធផលទាំងមូល។[BoardThick]គឺជាមាឌសំឡីតាមចំណុចលើក្រោមនិងទៅស្តាំ[BackBoardThick]គឺជាមាឌសំឡីផ្ទៃខាងក្រោយ។(គូរដោយ AI សូមពិនិត្យមើល។)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຊີດສໍາລັບຕູ້ໂອເທຄັນ Corrections השנים צפ
